steps.title: Use the passage's conclusion
steps.content: The passage says a much higher share of Bogotá respondents used parks even though fewer of them lived within a 10-minute walk of a park. It concludes that greater proximity alone cannot explain the difference.

steps.title: Reject unsupported claims
steps.content: B mentions source timing, C mentions researcher expectations, and D questions survey accuracy; none is discussed in the passage. The stated difference must have another cause besides park proximity. The answer is A.
